---
title: "Portraits of Illustrious Personages of Great Britai"
---

## Portraits of Illustrious Personages of Great Britai

**Author:** Edmund Lodge
**Date:** 1821-1834
**Imprint:** London: Lackington, Hughes, Harding, Mavor, and Lepard : and Longman, Hurst, Rees, Orme, and Brown

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
